This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

must_detect.matched_text:
Data subject: Mr. Rowan Elgin (employee and patient) requests access, deletion, and restriction of: (a) biometric time‑clock face geometry scans; (b) genetic carrier screen result “CF‑carrier positive (screen‑only)”; (c) treatment code T‑47 physical therapy sessions; (d) self‑disclosed religious affiliation “Seventh City Fellowship”; (e) union membership “Allied Care Technicians Local 12.”
Locator and obfuscated IDs: A c c o u n t  I D : HHB‑A9G‑3 9 9; HRIS: HR‑ELGIN‑0x7B; patient chart r e f : CHP/ELGIN/0x3D; portal: https://portal.harborstonehb.example/dsar?case=R‑ELGIN‑2026&tok=pct%2Fus‑ccpa
Scope: Under CCPA we treat consumer/household data reasonably linkable to Mr. Elgin; under HIPAA the above clinical items are PHI; under GLBA any linked application/loan telemetry is NPI and handled under 16 CFR 314.4.
MNPI/Reg FD gate: selective disclosure to covered market actors (sell‑side analysts, buy‑side PMs) is prohibited; DSAR fulfillment will exclude

must_not_detect.reason: Sports team name; not personal data or MNPI.

uncertain.reason: Voicemail code may be linkable to a person but not clearly covered by a specific allowed PII rule.
